case_title: LOPEZ, ROSA M. vs. RACINE, EDWARD A. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ROSA M. AS TO DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B. MARKETING GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP OF LOURDES S. BORREGO & EDWARD A. RACINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ROSA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACINE, EDWARD A. L.B. MARKETING GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP OF LOURDES S. BORREGO & EDWARD A. RACINE $4,426.47 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,506.47
